title: Glow Up!
description: An update to the glowier side of Minecraft.
body:
![Title Card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ff465559ee39a5380a08121e39a5d0cfe0ccc29.png)

## - Description -
Glow Up! is a simple datapack that adds a few minor (and unasked for) features to the glowier side of Minecraft. I felt Minecraft needed some way to use the glowing effect apart from the spectral arrow. That's why I made this pack. _(You can probably make some cool minigames)_

## - Features -
- **Glowing Leather Armor**
  - A new set of armor that makes the player glow when worn
  - Only one piece of the set is needed to work, and every piece can be redyed
- **Curse of Radiance**
  - A new curse that forces the glowing effect on the wearer
- **Glowier Glow Berries**
  - Players are granted 15 seconds of glowing after eating glow berries
  - Useful for those confusing multiplayer caving missions
- **Glow Berrier Spectral Arrows**
  - Glow berries can be used as a substitute for glowstone dust in the spectral arrow recipe

With cheats enabled, you can use the command `/function mglow:.item_selection` to gain the custom items without needing to craft them.

## - Installation -
Datapack: Just move the file into the `datapacks` folder of your world and start up the game. It's as simple as that!
Mod: Simply move the file into your `mods` folder of your world. The mod supports Fabric, Forge, and Quilt.
To uninstall, just remove the pack from the world/mod from your mods folder. Any special items will be left over, but it shouldn't affect performance at all.

## - Compatibility -
This datapack is **only compatible with 1.21** and will not work in any earlier versions

![pack icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e23c5c9f5620cbacb72641f00c4f7835795cc156.png)
